textByHashes.b8f6c0766af34fba0e7af443c5f79ee568d5081f: Please leave my husband alone. He's very sick, and I don't want anyone bothering him.
textByHashes.c125d7d48edeacc712fbc9afc7b84984effcc32b: Thank you, but I just want him to see a priest.
textByHashes.7abe5d3cd58b06dfd79ed0a68b089f5d5ea19209: Oh dear! Oh dear! I don't have time to chat!
textByHashes.e7a01e5e8b6ef57c0668de470e439cae4046acbc: I'm afraid that Guidor is not long for this world! So I'm not letting people see him now.
textByHashes.4a044713db66ed8c3938cc6e3e4a2c4fd85eb947: You heartless rogue! What could be more important than Guidor's life? A life spent well, if not always wisely... I just hope that Saradomin shows mercy on his soul!
textByHashes.b7093cbb972047816390c8efa4d9441ea79b40d9: Oh goodness no! But I am! If only I could get him to see a priest!
textByHashes.ec6bcb53bb96ba9f07b3d26c0d91857499690157: A priest! thank goodness! My husband is very ill! Perhaps you could read him his last rites?
textByHashes.6e19a2b889f977fced9f894ded8f6dd115081bd5: Hello there. I fear Guidor may not be long for this world!
textByHashes.5ef6af9a6fc59feeb24fcb15831b5a7cb2599020: Oh hello, I can't chat now. I have to keep an eye on my husband. He's very ill!
